title: Central Auth Domain with Cookie Isolation
description:
Establish a single auth domain (`auth.datatoolspro.com`) so that each tenant subdomain remains cookie-isolated while authentication flows through a central point.

## Requirements

- Unauthenticated users on `toyota.us1.datatoolspro.com` redirect to `auth.datatoolspro.com/login?...` with tenant context
- No cookies are shared between tenant subdomains and pooled hosts
- The auth domain is the only service that directly communicates with Stytch login endpoints
acceptance_criteria: Unauthenticated requests redirect to auth.datatoolspro.com with tenant context
No cookies are shared between different tenant subdomains
Auth domain is the sole interface to Stytch login endpoints
Return redirects after login land the user on the correct tenant subdomain
middleware_changes: Auth domain application handles login initiation, Stytch communication, and post-login redirects back to tenant subdomains.
implementation_notes: Central auth domain pattern provides cookie isolation between tenants. The auth domain acts as a trusted intermediary between tenant subdomains and Stytch, preventing direct Stytch API exposure on tenant hosts.
